roles.core: central bot, central wallet, PasarGuard integration, Plisio, CubePay callback verification and D1 authority
roles.edge: web panels, reseller bots, customer miniapps, reseller Plisio and reseller CubePay payments
roles.processor: report retries, topic repair, daily reports, backups and background jobs

features: add CubePay card-to-card payment beside Plisio for the central bot and central wallet
add independent CubePay configuration and wallet recharge for every reseller bot
store CubePay API tokens encrypted and delete Telegram messages containing secrets after saving
create invoices with Bearer authentication and convert toman amounts to rial before sending
preserve and display CubePay exact randomized payable amount returned by pay_amount/pay_amount_toman
treat CubePay callbacks only as notifications and call verify-payment before crediting a wallet
enforce order and amount matching and one-time wallet crediting for central and reseller payments
recover safely from CubePay HTTP 409 already-verified responses through local idempotency guards
use a separate reseller_cubepay_configs table to avoid the reseller_bots column limit
resolve the public HTTPS callback origin correctly when API requests are forwarded between Workers
keep Plisio, automatic USD-to-toman rates, report topics and PasarGuard 5.1 compatibility

validation.javascript_syntax: passed for core, edge and processor
validation.sqlite_schema: SCHEMA_SQL executed successfully in SQLite; CubePay tables and invoice columns verified
validation.invoice_storage: central and reseller CubePay INSERT statements executed in a schema smoke test
validation.idempotency: central credit SQL replay test credited the wallet once and created one ledger record
validation.callback_security: static assertion: callback evidence is stored, then verify-payment is required before credit
validation.live_cubepay_payment: not run; no live CubePay merchant API token was supplied
